item.title: Monkey Ransomware — Some AI-written Ransomware
item.description: A new ransomware family surfaced recently (credit: Gameel Ali). He didn’t plan a deep dive, so we decided to take one. The result is… odd. Dissection was easy; the design is incoherent. Our working theory is that this is largely AI-generated malware. People often ask: “Why analyze ransomware? It’s destructive; by the time analysis happens, […]

item.title: ValleyRAT Exploiting BYOVD to Kill Endpoint Security
item.description: During threat-intelligence activities, we identified a new ValleyRAT campaign distributing fake application installers (e.g., WinRAR, Telegram, and others). The installer drops multiple binaries; one stood out: a file named NVIDIA.exe (SHA-256: b4ac2e473c5d6c5e1b8430a87ef4f33b53b9ba0f585d3173365e437de4c816b2), which, during analysis, revealed the presence of an unknown driver used to support its operations. NVIDIA.exe’s main logic is deliberately simple. It defines […]

item.title: Automating CrowdStrike Network Containment
item.description: In a previous post, we have shown how Velociraptor and CrowdStrike can work together to speed up the deep‑dive phase of an investigation. One topic left open was containment. When an EDR flags genuinely high‑risk behaviour, isolating the host is often the safest move, and—if your rules are well tuned—doing it automatically is even better. […]

item.title: Hexastrike Cybersecurity
item.description: Hexastrike is an IT security company specializing in developing reliable and scalable SaaS platforms, software and courses to streamline cyber incident response, threat hunting and digital forensics.

item.title: About - Hexastrike Cybersecurity
item.description: Mission Statement About Hexastrike Hexastrike provides practical tools, training, and resources to improve cyber incident response, threat hunting and threat analysis. Built on experience from over 100 real-world incidents handled every year, the focus lays on reducing time to respond, improving operational quality, and limiting business impact during active threats. Founded in 2021, Hexastrike was […]
